Role: Real-time job postings change multiple times per day and cannot be reliably 'verified' in a static document. Below is a toolkit of pre-built, live search links - one row per role per portal - that your team should check DAILY. These links are constructed using each portal's standard search-URL format and will always show CURRENT openings.
